original_image_tags: Back of a tan or orange manila file folder, showing the reverse side. The paper is aged with wear and tear along the edges. A small metal fastener or staple is visible near the top. Two pieces of orange tape are affixed to the left and right edges. A stamped ink impression is located at the bottom right corner, oriented upside-down relative to the folder's upright position.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp near the bottom of a blank, aged page. The stamp reads 'RECEIVED', 'JUL 23 4 57 PM '47', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F.B.I.', and partially visible 'DEPT. OF JUST'.

judge.reason: Descriptions disagree on core visual content: A describes a folder with tape and fasteners, while B describes a stamped page, indicating they are viewing different images or one is fabricating.
